zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Rumilly於大約1116年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親William le Meschin40歲，母親Cecily Rumilly26歲。她於1138年與William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1187年在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Rumilly于大约1116年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲William le Meschin40岁，母亲Cecily Rumilly26岁。她于1138年与William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1187年在苏格兰培爾阿爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rumilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from Romilly in Eure (France). Some examples may belong under (2) or (3), and there has probably been confusion between them.
2  Norman, English: locative name from Remilly in Manche (France).

variants.name: Rumley
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Romilly in Eure (France) or from Remilly in Manche (France).
English: habitational name from Romiley (Cheshire), from Old English rūm ‘roomy, spacious’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Altered form of Swiss German Rümmeli or Rümmele, variants of Rummel .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Rumilly was born about 1116, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William le Meschin, was 40 and her mother, Cecily Rumilly, was 26. She married William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray in 1138, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1187, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Rumilly est née environ 1116, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William le Meschin, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Cecily Rumilly, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray en 1138, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1187, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Rumilly um 1116 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William le Meschin 40 und ihre Mutter Cecily Rumilly 26. Sie hat 1138 in Yorkshire, England William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1187 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Rumilly è nata il circa 1116 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William le Meschin, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Cecily Rumilly, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray nel 1138, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1187, nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Rumillyが約1116年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William le Meschinは40歳，母Cecily Rumillyは26歳であった。1138年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでWilliam FitzDuncan Earl of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1187年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Rumilly(이)가 대략 1116년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William le Meschin(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Rumilly(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1138년 영국 요르크실르에서 William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1187년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Rumilly nasceu aproximadamente 1116, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William le Meschin, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Rumilly, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray em 1138, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1187, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Rumilly родилась около 1116 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William le Meschin было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Rumilly, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray в 1138 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1187 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Rumilly nació aproximadamente 1116, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William le Meschin, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Cecily Rumilly, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray en 1138, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1187, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años.
